title: DCAv2 Execution State
description: Defines the machine-readable structure for recording the current bounded execution state of DCAv2. Execution state describes authorization, repository state, completed work, pending work, tests, failures, external operations, cleanup, and the next human decision. It does not authorize implementation, continuation, repository access, credential use, remediation, publication, deployment, merge, infrastructure modification, destructive operations, or transition to another phase.
